# integrationGitlabConnect

Connects the organization with a GitLab Access Token.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`GitLabIntegrationCreatePayload`](../objects/git_lab_integration_create_payload-object.md)!

## Arguments

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `accessToken` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The GitLab Access Token to connect with. |
| `gitlabUrl` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The URL of the GitLab installation. |
